headlines.title: Trump plugs Dell at first-ever White House opening bell, sending shares soaring
headlines.summary: Trump rang the bell in the Oval Office to open Monday's trading as he launched investment accounts for babies born from 2025 through 2028.

headlines.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
headlines.summary: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.

headlines.title: Belgium set to appeal as FIFA reverses Balogun's World Cup suspension after Trump reportedly intervenes
headlines.summary: Folarin Balogun was surprisingly cleared by FIFA to play for the United States Men's National Team in the World Cup against Belgium on Monday.

headlines.title: SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell to donate stock to Trump Accounts
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump told CNBC's Joe Kernen last week that he thought SpaceX CEO Elon Musk would donate company stock to the program.

headlines.title: Lockheed Martin to buy naval defense firm Ultra Maritime for $3.45 billion
headlines.summary: Ultra is owned by private equity firm Advent International, and specialises in anti-submarine technology.

headlines.title: Versant agrees to buy golf simulator company Full Swing for $530 million
headlines.summary: The deal for Full Swing will expand Versant's nontraditional media assets in an effort to diversify revenue from cable television.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for boosting portfolio returns
headlines.summary: With thousands of dividend-paying companies to choose from, identifying the right stocks can be challenging.

headlines.title: Tech bulls lose conviction as key trading metric blows out to the widest since 2008
headlines.summary: The pick-up in demand for puts aligns with slowing momentum in AI stocks that had been consistently rewarding speculators to the upside.

headlines.title: Most prediction market contracts have low volume, leaving users exposed to volatility and bots
headlines.summary: Prediction market volume has grown exponentially but several markets never make it over $10,000.

headlines.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
headlines.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."

headlines.title: Bulls are betting big on this global ETF that's deep in a bear market
headlines.summary: U.S. stocks just keep winning, with the Nasdaq closing out its best quarter since 2020. Across the globe in China, things couldn't be more different.

headlines.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
headlines.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."

headlines.title: ‘The money would have been life-changing’: My father told my grandmother to slash my inheritance. Is that fair?
headlines.summary: “I could have bought a home for what I hope will be a growing family.”

headlines.title: How parents can take advantage of the ‘best summer-camp tax break in years’
headlines.summary: For many kids, summer means camp. For many of their parents, that means financial juggling to pay for those camp experiences.

headlines.title: Trump rings Wall Street opening bells and says the stock market ‘is going to go through the roof’
headlines.summary: Trump used the occasion to promote the launch of “Trump accounts,” which are special investment accounts for children under age 18.

headlines.title: As oil exits the ‘danger zone,’ here’s what history suggests happens next for stocks
headlines.summary: The swift pullback in oil prices is a tailwind for the economy, says Evercore ISI

headlines.title: Global stocks may be headed for a summer swoon. Why AI won’t be the only story that matters, JPMorgan says
headlines.summary: Strategists at the investment bank outlined five key drivers for global equities in the months ahead

headlines.title: Your investing expectations are more than double the reality. Here is the tough truth.
headlines.summary: Long-term real returns above 10% annualized are exceedingly rare.

observations: High concentration in Communication Services sector, primarily driven by META.
Significant unrealized losses in several positions (OKLO, NFLX, IREN, FBL, RUN) indicating potential overexposure to underperforming assets.
Cash position is above the minimum cash buffer requirement but could be better utilized for rebalancing.
suggested_changes: Trim META by ~6 share(s) to bring weight under 25%
Consider reallocating cash to strengthen positions in preferred themes such as AI, clean energy, and cybersecurity.
Evaluate underperforming positions (OKLO, NFLX, IREN, FBL, RUN) for potential exit or reallocation.
open_questions: What are the long-term growth prospects for the current underperforming positions?
Is there a specific entry point or strategy for reallocating cash into preferred themes?
How does the investor feel about the current level of risk associated with the concentrated positions?

candidates.thesis: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing is a leader in advanced chip manufacturing, benefiting from secular growth in AI and compute infrastructure. Positioned to capitalize on increasing demand for high-performance semiconductors.
candidates.risk: Stop below 400 (key support level), target 600 (long-term growth potential)

candidates.thesis: ASML dominates the lithography equipment market, critical for advanced semiconductor manufacturing. Strong tailwinds from AI and compute infrastructure growth.
candidates.risk: Stop below 1550, target 2500 (secular growth in semiconductor demand)

candidates.thesis: Cloudflare is a leader in cybersecurity and edge computing, benefiting from secular growth in internet infrastructure and increasing cybersecurity needs.
candidates.risk: Stop below 210, target 350 (expansion of services and market share)

candidates.thesis: Beam Global specializes in clean energy solutions, including solar-powered EV charging stations. Positioned to benefit from the global push towards renewable energy and electrification.
candidates.risk: Stop below 28, target 60 (long-term adoption of clean energy solutions)
